serviceSummary: PM brief: Revenue operations needs a bounded GTM agent that can answer pipeline health questions, identify at-risk accounts, prepare follow-up work, and stop safely before any downstream mutation. The first release should stay on one CRM pipeline dataset, one pipeline-focused ANIP service, and one clear hero flow that can be validated against implementation metadata in Studio.

capabilities.title: Return a bounded pipeline health summary for a quarter and optional scope.
capabilities.summary: Return a bounded pipeline health summary for a quarter and optional scope.
clarificationRules: scope is underspecified for the requested comparison
denialRules: the user asks for raw row-level export instead of a bounded summary
notes: use Cube measures for bounded aggregations

capabilities.title: Return a bounded forecast summary for open pipeline with likely, best-case, and risk-adjusted views.
capabilities.summary: Return a bounded forecast summary for open pipeline with likely, best-case, and risk-adjusted views.
denialRules: the user asks for raw row-level forecast export instead of a bounded summary
notes: read aggregate forecast slices through Cube over dbt-modeled GTM opportunities

capabilities.title: Return a bounded stage bottleneck summary for open pipeline by an allowed slice.
capabilities.summary: Return a bounded stage bottleneck summary for open pipeline by an allowed slice.
denialRules: the user asks for raw export or unsupported slicing instead of a bounded bottleneck summary
boundedEvidence: average days open by allowed slice
average risk concentration by allowed slice
notes: read aggregate stage bottleneck slices through Cube over dbt-modeled GTM opportunities

capabilities.title: Return a bounded sales team performance summary for a quarter and optional scope.
capabilities.summary: Return a bounded sales team performance summary for a quarter and optional scope.
denialRules: the user asks for raw export or unsupported slicing instead of a bounded team performance summary
boundedEvidence: open risk and stall indicators by team
notes: read aggregate team performance slices through Cube over dbt-modeled GTM pipeline views

capabilities.title: Return a bounded product pipeline summary for a quarter and optional scope.
capabilities.summary: Return a bounded product pipeline summary for a quarter and optional scope.
denialRules: the user asks for raw export instead of a bounded product summary
boundedEvidence: loss and risk posture by product
notes: read aggregate product slices through Cube over dbt-modeled GTM opportunities

capabilities.title: Return stalled open opportunities with bounded evidence and explainable stall reasoning.
capabilities.summary: Return stalled open opportunities with bounded evidence and explainable stall reasoning.
clarificationRules: stalled-days threshold is missing when the request is ambiguous
denialRules: the user asks for unconstrained raw pipeline export
notes: derive stall duration from modeled opportunity dates

capabilities.title: Rank at-risk accounts with explicit evidence for why they need attention.
capabilities.summary: Rank at-risk accounts with explicit evidence for why they need attention.
denialRules: the request asks for unconstrained export or out-of-scope outreach work
notes: risk ranking must stay explainable in the response payload

capabilities.title: Prepare a reassignment preview for overloaded pipeline coverage without executing downstream mutations.
capabilities.summary: Prepare a reassignment preview for overloaded pipeline coverage without executing downstream mutations.
capabilities.sideEffectLevel: approval-gated write contract; the runtime returns an approval_required preview until approval exists
denialRules: the request asks to execute assignment mutations directly
approvalRules: any downstream reassignment execution would occur
notes: return approval_required with a preview payload instead of mutating assignment ownership

capabilities.title: Prepare follow-up tasks for high-risk accounts without executing downstream mutations.
capabilities.summary: Prepare follow-up tasks for high-risk accounts without executing downstream mutations.
capabilities.sideEffectLevel: approval-gated write contract; the Phase 1 runtime returns an approval_required preview until approval exists
clarificationRules: target accounts or quarter are missing
denialRules: the request asks to execute CRM mutations directly in phase 1
approvalRules: any downstream task creation or CRM mutation would occur
notes: return approval_required with a preview payload instead of mutating downstream systems
